horoscope: Jupiter moves into your sector of joy today, dear Aries, and will visit it until July 2027. This transit blesses your leisurely activities, dating life, and creative endeavors for a little over a year. You'll enjoy increased popularity, and you can be excited to break free from certain inhibitions about expressing yourself as you begin the second half of 2026. You have been doing a lot of work on yourself recently, and now is the time to share the "new you" (which, in fact, is still evolving). New hobbies are very possible in the period ahead. Channels for fun, love, and self-expression are opening. New opportunities to truly enjoy yourself through recreation, pastimes, and other amusements will likely come your way. Romantic opportunities also expand. Still, Mercury is just beginning its retrograde cycle, and you may have to fix some problems or deal with delays in the three weeks ahead. Fortunately, it’s a time of great ideas for enjoying and improving domestic life. You might revisit old projects or ideas, particularly related to family and domestic matters.

Jupiter, the planet of plenty, moves into your solar fourth house of family, roots, and home today, dear Taurus. This transit will last over a year--until July 2027--and will likely bring about great improvements in your personal and domestic life. There can be more rewarding relationships with loved ones, a new addition to your family, the urge to expand, redecorate, or build your home and domestic world, or the beginning of a new, long-term project or business venture. It’s time for an upgrade of your living conditions or arrangements. Being with family and building or enhancing your home can be especially enjoyable. You can feel very fulfilled, although not especially adventurous, during this transit. Inner and personal experiences hold far more appeal than worldly pursuits now. You’ll also build your emotional foundation and strive towards a general sense of comfort and centeredness. It’s a time for learning more about yourself, your heart, and the people closest to you. Mercury has just turned retrograde, however, and it stirs the need to review how you’re communicating and getting around. Small repairs may be necessary with devices and transportation, for example.

Jupiter moves into your communications sector today, dear Gemini, where it will spend over a year. You’re moving away from a strong focus on your resources, money matters, and a building phase of your life, and you’re heading into a stage that’s more about learning, diversifying, and connecting. Jupiter is now moving in harmony with your sign, which is a nice boost. New ways to communicate, learn, and move about can open up in the period ahead. Your enthusiasm for learning new things and taking on new projects can be incredible now. During this helpful transit, aim to reach new heights in your learning, writing, or speaking projects. There could be improved relations with siblings, neighbors, classmates, and acquaintances. You connect more easily or pleasantly, and you could enjoy good fortune with vehicles, through siblings, and with the communications industry. It can be a time of setting up a more connected, work or learning-friendly environment. Fun things can happen close to home and in your neighborhood. For the most part, you’re more confident than ever about expressing yourself. Still, Mercury has just begun its retrograde cycle, and you’ll need to orient yourself with these changes before you can truly get a sense of your next step.

Jupiter, the planet of plenty, leaves your sign and moves into your solar second house today, dear Cancer, where it will visit for over a year. This begins a theme of excellent benefits revolving around money, earnings, possessions, and personal talents. It’s a fabulous time to build on existing resources, a business, or a project, and enjoy the rewards of your past efforts. It can be a time of elevated confidence in yourself to manifest your desires. Your earning power increases, and new avenues for making money can open up in the period ahead, or you experience a wonderful sense of abundance now. You may have more confidence and enthusiasm for business or endeavors and pursuits involving building and development. There can be a strong desire to pamper yourself, splurge, and luxuriate, and opportunities might emerge to do these things! While you should watch for extravagance, overall, this is a good cycle for bringing a fresh, positive, and confident attitude toward your practical affairs and your own self-worth and value. Still, Mercury has just begun its retrograde in your sign, and it’s better not to begin a brand new project, as it will likely get off to a slow start, or you might reconsider it later.

Jupiter enters your sign today, dear Leo, and this celebrated transit will unfold over the coming year and a little more, until July 2027. Ideas for future ventures can be golden. You’re not afraid to explore, and you’re making your own opportunities by putting more faith in yourself and your capabilities. This transit is about awakening. Your desire to truly live life, rather than simply go through the motions, will soon begin to take over. The reflection you've done recently will help pave the way for making the best of this liberating transit. This cycle helps you build confidence and generosity. Your image improves considerably, and you exude incredible warmth. People enjoy being around you! This transit comes only every twelve years and brings you out of your shell. It’s a time to pursue your dreams and personal plans. New projects can begin in the year ahead with long-term potential. You may not yet know where you’re heading with them, but you’re enthusiastic about starting anew. However, Mercury has just begun its retrograde cycle, and you could be dealing with old problems that resurface, delays, or a lack of clear messages, instructions, and explanations in the weeks ahead. Decision-making can be complicated in the near future, as you play with different possibilities or missing information.

Jupiter moves into your solar twelfth house today, dear Virgo, and it's a defining transit for the year ahead. This influence encourages you to enjoy your private time. It’s a time of spiritual renewal, cleanup, and greater attention to mental health. The desire to regroup, process, and heal is big until July 2027. As you begin the second half of 2026, you can experience an awakening of your inner life and powerful intuition. Benefits come from behind the scenes. You’ll be gaining a better relationship with yourself from the inside out! Your sympathetic nature deepens, and you can thoroughly enjoy helping others. Discovering untapped resources can figure strongly. This transit can bring more joy to your private world and behind-the-scenes activities. It’s a most excellent influence for enjoying your own company, gaining more peace, trusting your intuition, and supporting others or doing good deeds. Still, Mercury has just begun its retrograde cycle, and there can be old friends occupying your thoughts, reappearing, or otherwise becoming more relevant in the weeks ahead. Or, this energy can be about reviewing past plans, dreams, and goals. Avoid taking on new projects now and think about what you’d like to change to make your social life happier.

Jupiter moves into your social sector today, dear Libra, bringing benefits and special attention to friends, groups, community, and hopes/wishes. This transit will stick with you for over a year, until July 2027. Ideally, you’ve accomplished some pretty big things and now have more freedom to pursue goals that are less about performance and more about enjoyment. Jupiter loosens you up in this way. You’re more interested in contributing to group efforts or your community. This cycle brings benefits and increased joy to friendships, new ideas and projects, and networking or group activities. It's time to create a mission statement for your life, focusing on happiness goals or giving back to the community. Friends can be helpful, supportive, and involved. This can be a time of budding friendships or group involvements, following up on leads, connecting with friends of friends, and pursuing a dream or happiness goal more wholeheartedly and confidently. Still, Mercury has just turned retrograde, suggesting a need to rethink certain goals in the near future. You may need to backtrack over work that you thought was complete. This process eventually works to your advantage, as you’ll be better prepared to seize the opportunities that come your way, knowing what you want.

Jupiter heads to the top of your solar chart, dear Scorpio, and is poised to boost your reputation and career for over a year. Until July 2027, you’re likely to take more interest and pride in your accomplishments, as Jupiter here motivates you to shoot a little higher. You might find yourself in a position to manage others, or there could be a promotion or more enjoyable work and goals during this pivotal Jupiter transit. There can be a career peak of sorts happening in the period ahead. It’s a fine time to show the world what you can do and to achieve, accomplish, harvest, recognize, and take on new responsibilities. You’re projecting an image that shows others you truly value yourself, which can attract respect and possibly also monetary rewards. Your status and recognition can change for the better. People in authority tend to see your potential more than ever. You’re more visible, outgoing, and spirited in the period ahead. Still, Mercury has just turned retrograde, and you might need to review a project or pursuit, or you could be waiting on word or information that keeps you in limbo in the near future.

Jupiter moves into your spirit sector today, dear Sagittarius, and as your ruling planet, it's an especially significant move. This booster transit will stick with you for over a year, until July 2027. In the period ahead, you tackle life’s everyday problems with more confidence and come out of your “shell” in many ways as you enter a decidedly more outgoing phase of your life. You’re awakening to new ways of expressing yourself, learning about others and the world around you, a spirit for adventure, and a sense that you are truly living your life, not just going through the motions. It can be a time to update your skills, pursue higher education, or enjoy a special interest. This transit encourages you to explore and expand your mind. You’re also more easygoing in your day-to-day life, as you find it easier to rise above minor problems and put things into perspective during this cycle. There may be new opportunities to learn, publish, communicate, promote, or form cross-cultural connections that are of great value and benefit to you. Still, Mercury has just begun its retrograde cycle, and it may be best to double-check the details. Shared resources or debts owed may require a second look.

Jupiter moves into your solar eighth house today, dear Capricorn, where it will visit for over a year, until July 2027. There can be new levels of intimacy ahead, and great pleasure in being close to someone. New heights and depths can be experienced in a relationship, which can add to your inner glow, or this transit can be about a deeper connection to a special project and an understanding of your inner workings. It can also be a time to sort out your debt or joint finances. You’re determined to get a hold on your life, perhaps through tackling bad habits or attitudes that may have been undermining your confidence. Happily, opportunities are likely to emerge to do so. Increased benefits can come through others, a partner’s income could increase, or you might combine talents with someone to work towards an important goal. Your intimate world is rich and deep, and your connection to someone or a passion project deepens. You’re more courageous and interested in healing, growing, and overcoming your fears. Still, Mercury has just begun its retrograde cycle, and there can be some communication challenges to manage in the near future. You may be reworking projects or returning to old jobs that need attention.

Jupiter heads into your partnership sector today, dear Aquarius, where it will visit for over a year, until July 2027. It’s a fine time to benefit from counseling or partnering. Someone coming into your life during this period can be significant. You'll learn a lot from your experiences and interactions with an important person in the period ahead. Negotiations, counseling, advising, and work with the public are in favor. You’ll have opportunities to expand your horizons and enjoy or benefit from your connections more than usual. You attract people who want to help, who are on your side, and who take a keen interest in you. Or, you put more faith in people and relationships, in general, and feel more confident about yourself in relationships! You’ll find getting along with others more natural and beneficial, and you could be inspired by someone to make a positive change in your life. Still, Mercury has just turned retrograde in your work and health sector, and in the weeks ahead, you may need to backtrack and review matters needing special attention or editing. It might feel as if things are stalling or even moving backward, but the refinements you make during this cycle, which lasts until July 23rd, can be especially beneficial.

Jupiter moves into the work and health house of your solar chart today, dear Pisces, where it will visit for over a year, until July 2027. You'll likely find more joy and satisfaction in your work or daily routines, and if you’re looking for new work, this is a very employable time. There will be plenty of opportunities to improve your life going forward, particularly through better working conditions and advancement potential. Your positive attitude toward your duties could play a key role in attracting these potential windfalls. Paying more attention to the mind/spirit element of your work and health can do wonders for you in the period ahead. Self-improvement endeavors and health efforts stand out as beneficial during this cycle. You bring fresh and original ideas to your work or services, or a vocation, life path, or direction may seem to magically fall into place during this period. Still, Mercury has just turned retrograde, and it may be best to avoid overloading your schedule and bringing up tricky topics.
